executives.name: Carlos Ruiz Sacristan
executives.background: Director since 2004. Chairman of the Board of Sempra Infrastructure and former Secretary of Communications and Transportation of Mexico.

executives.name: Luis Miguel Palomino Bonilla
executives.background: Director since 2004. Chairman of the Board of Directors of the Peruvian Institute of Economics and Director of the Central Reserve Bank of Peru.
